subject: Financial Model Update - Three Scenario Analysis
body:
FP&A Team,

I've updated our three-year financial model with three scenarios:

Base Case (60% probability):
- Revenue CAGR: 35%
- Gross margin: 78% → 82%
- EBITDA margin: 8% → 18%
- Cash flow positive by Q4 2026

Upside Case (25% probability):
- Revenue CAGR: 50% (assumes successful expansion into healthcare vertical)
- Gross margin: 78% → 85%
- EBITDA margin: 8% → 25%
- Would support IPO timeline in 2027

Downside Case (15% probability):
- Revenue CAGR: 20% (macro slowdown, increased competition)
- Gross margin: 78% → 75%
- EBITDA margin: 8% → 5%
- Would require additional funding round by Q2 2027

Key assumptions and sensitivity tables are in the attached Excel workbook. The model is also available in our shared Anaplan workspace.

Let's review together before presenting to the board.
